languages.text: "Эоганн, вы с генетором Таванти составите превосходный исследовательский тандем".
"Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, уверен, что вы с Оксильдой раскроете генетические тайны Заркова".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."
"Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."
"Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

languages.text: «Eogunn, creo firmemente que Oksilda y usted descubrirán los secretos genéticos de Zarkov».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, creo firmemente que Oksilda y usted descubrirán los secretos genéticos de Zarkov».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，我相信你与奥克西尔达联手，一定能揭开扎尔科夫的基因秘密。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，我相信你与奥克西尔达联手，一定能揭开扎尔科夫的基因秘密。”

languages.text: « Eogunn, Oskilda et vous serez certainement en mesure de percer les mystères de la génétique de Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, Oskilda et vous serez certainement en mesure de percer les mystères de la génétique de Zarkov. »

languages.text: "Eogunn, Oksilda'yla birlikte Zarkov'un genetik sırlarını ortaya çıkaracağınızdan eminim."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, Oksilda'yla birlikte Zarkov'un genetik sırlarını ortaya çıkaracağınızdan eminim."

languages.text: 「エオガン、君とオクシルダなら、二人でザルコフの遺伝的秘密を必ず解き明かせると確信している」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン、君とオクシルダなら、二人でザルコフの遺伝的秘密を必ず解き明かせると確信している」

languages.text: "Eogunn, ich bin sicher, Ihr und Oksilda werdet Zarkovs genetische Geheimnisse gemeinsam lüften."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, I am certain that together you and Oksilda will uncover Zarkov's genetic secrets."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, ich bin sicher, Ihr und Oksilda werdet Zarkovs genetische Geheimnisse gemeinsam lüften."
